## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Click on '...'

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
